title: List of financial institutions
doc_html:
§1049.  List of financial institutions

When a license is suspended and revoked, the licensee shall supply the commissioner with a list of the financial institutions where he has transacted such business as is governed by the provisions of this Chapter.

Acts 1990, No. 827, §1.
